purpose: Machine-readable WellFit risk classifier for future Codex/AI agents. Use before selecting work from project-register/agent-task-queue.json and before changing files.

low.description: Documentation, planning, or registry maintenance that does not change runtime behavior and does not touch protected areas.

medium.description: Small scoped existing UI/API/feature work that may affect behavior but avoids authority, sensitive data, protected areas, and compliance-critical logic.

high.description: Backend, Firestore, Functions, native, AR/Unity, mission authority-adjacent, reward-adjacent, security, or data-flow work where mistakes could create product, security, or governance risk.

critical.description: Compliance-critical, financial-equivalent, child/sensitive data, legal/privacy, token/NFT/wallet/payment/betting, or final authority work. Future agents must stop unless explicit human approval and review plan are present.

protectedAreas.reason: Local Unity work and old PR #13 must remain isolated unless the repository owner explicitly instructs otherwise.
Do not merge, close, depend on, or use old Unity PR #13 as a shortcut.
Points, XP, rewards, mission completion, anti-cheat, inventory unlocks, and rare-item grants must not become final client authority.
Mobile/beta must not activate token, NFT, trading, presale, wallet, payment, or financial-equivalent mechanics.
Health, child-safety, location, camera, privacy, consent, and legal/compliance areas require explicit review.

automaticStopRules: Current branch is main or a protected branch.
Requested work requires touching native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR or PR #13 without explicit repository-owner instruction.
Requested work would delete TODO, roadmap, status, planning, register, handoff, or historical context files instead of marking/linking them.
Requested work would create a duplicate app shell, design system, route, API, feature module, economy system, ledger, data model, or architecture beside an existing leading file.
Requested work would expose secrets or server API keys to frontend code or documentation examples.
Requested work would enable token/NFT/wallet/payment/betting/trading/presale/payout/staking or real marketplace behavior.
Requested work would grant final reward, point, XP, mission completion, anti-cheat, inventory, rare-item, or ledger authority to the client.

Requested work would collect, expand, or process health, child, location, camera, biometric, privacy, consent, wallet/payment, or reward-evidence data without explicit approval and data-minimization plan.
Requested work would change legal, AGB, Datenschutz, Impressum, privacy, or compliance messaging without explicit approval and review plan.
Required source-of-truth files conflict and no leading file can be identified.
documentationOnlyAllowedWhen: The request mentions protected or critical areas but asks for planning, architecture, inventory, or risk documentation only.
The next step is unclear, blocked by human/legal/security approval, or would require product logic changes beyond the prompt.
Existing registers are stale or incomplete and runtime work would depend on unverified route/API/feature inventory.
Emulator, Firebase, native, or external service requirements prevent safe verification in the current environment.
The task is to align AGENTS.md, WORK_MAP.md, TODO_INDEX.md, current-state docs, or project-register governance controls.
explicitHumanApprovalRequiredWhen: Changing token, NFT, wallet, payment, purchase, payout, marketplace, staking, presale, trading, WFT, betting, PvP stake, or competition payout behavior.
Changing final reward, XP, points, mission completion, anti-cheat, ledger, inventory unlock, or rare-item authorization logic.
Changing health, watch, location, camera, child-safety, biometric, privacy, consent, medical-adjacent, legal, AGB, Datenschutz, Impressum, or compliance messaging/logic.
Touching native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR, Unity scripts, native AR runtime behavior, or old Unity PR #13.
Deploying, merging to main, live-enabling production services, or creating production data writes.
Introducing a new API, route, feature module, provider, external analytics service, data retention behavior, or Firestore write path that is not already covered by registers and architecture docs.
Creating real admin approval actions without authenticated role checks, append-only audit logging, and Owner review for high/critical/protected scopes.
classificationProcedure: Read global first-read files from agent-task-queue.json.
Map requested files, keywords, routes, APIs, and features against protectedAreas.
Assign the highest matching risk level; critical overrides high, high overrides medium, and medium overrides low.
Select a task type from definition-of-done.json and a task candidate from agent-task-queue.json.
If any automaticStopRules match, stop or convert to planning-only if documentationOnlyAllowedWhen applies.
Before committing, verify git status and ensure only intentional documentation/register files changed for documentation-only tasks.
